channel.title: mbAInewsletter
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from mbAInewsletter, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: BlackRock Blinked — Now Everyone Is Watching Blackstone, Apollo and KKR
item.description: BlackRock capped withdrawals at a $26B private credit fund, raising questions about liquidity risks across Blackstone, Apollo and KKR. Importance Rank...

item.title: Saba launches investment trust ETF
item.description: Activist investor Saba Capital Management has launched an exchange-traded fund that offers exposure to discounted UK investment trusts

item.title: Say farewell to winter from Mallorca
item.description: Escape the cold with a getaway to Mallorca in the Balearic Islands where the seafood is fresh and the sun is plentiful, says Merryn Somerset Webb

item.title: Investors take refuge in hard assets
item.description: Hard assets –businesses that are rooted in the physical world –may be set to prosper as investors move away from AI and ‘asset-light’ stocks
